reasoning: Both models skipped the critical PKGBUILD file (mistakenly flagged as binary), leaving no files reviewed. PKGBUILD defines build/install behavior and is essential for security assessment.
coverage_issues: PKGBUILD (build/install logic) skipped by both models
No review of .install hooks, source files, or network operations
false_negatives: All potential risks in PKGBUILD (malicious commands, unsafe downloads) were missed
Install hook behavior and source code security unknown
learnings: Fix binary file detection: PKGBUILD is always text – tool must not skip it
Prioritize PKGBUILD/.install files over unrelated files in future audits
Add fallback mechanism when PKGBUILD is unreadable – flag as critical failure
Improve error handling: 'binary file' classification for core files should trigger manual review
